name: cowork-obsidian
description: Wire Claude Cowork to a local Obsidian vault. Auto-detect existing vaults or scaffold a new one. Three modes (external / overlay / scaffold). Sync across machines via Obsidian Sync, Syncthing, or Git/GitHub. Optional Claude Desktop MCP path. Multi-vault aware. Three canonical prompts (build / update / health-check) plus a weekly rhythm. Built by Nuno Tavares of Automated Marketer.
